lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਹਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਧਾਰੀ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak har kirapaa dhaaree man har har meetthaa laae jeeo |
lines.english: The Lord has showered His Mercy upon servant Nanak, and the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, seems so sweet to his mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿਆ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਮੁਖਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਸਭਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam japiaa aaraadhiaa mukh masatak bhaag sabhaagaa |
lines.english: I chant and meditate in adoration upon the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, according to the good destiny written upon my forehead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਪਾਖਣ ਹਮ ਤਾਰਹੁ ਕਢਿ ਲੇਵਹੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੫॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: har deaa prabh dhaarahu paakhan ham taarahu kadt levahu sabad subhaae jeeo |4|5|12|
lines.english: O Lord God, shower Your Mercy upon me; I am just a stone. Please, carry me across, and lift me up with ease, through the Word of the Shabad. ||4||5||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਮਨਿ ਚਾਉ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: man naam japaanaa har har man bhaanaa har bhagat janaa man chaau jeeo |
lines.english: One who chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord, Har, Har in his mind - the Lord is pleasing to his mind. In the mind of the devotees there is a great yearning for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਜਨ ਮਰਿ ਜੀਵੇ ਤਿਨੑ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਵੇ ਮਨਿ ਲਾਗਾ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਭਾਉ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo jan mar jeeve tina amrit peeve man laagaa guramat bhaau jeeo |
lines.english: Those humble beings who remain dead while yet alive, drink in the Ambrosial Nectar; through the Guru's Teachings, their minds embrace love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਉ ਗੁਰੁ ਕਰੇ ਪਸਾਉ ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤੁ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: man har har bhaau gur kare pasaau jeevan mukat sukh hoee |
lines.english: Their minds love the Lord, Har, Har, and the Guru is Merciful to them. They are Jivan Mukta - liberated while yet alive, and they are at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਣਿ ਮਰਣਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਹੇਲੇ ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jeevan maran har naam suhele man har har hiradai soee |
lines.english: Their birth and death, through the Name of the Lord, are illustrious, and in their hearts and minds, the Lord, Har, Har, abides.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਾਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤ ਜਨਾ ਮਨਿ ਚਾਉ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: man naam japaanaa har har man bhaanaa har bhagat janaa man chaau jeeo |1|
lines.english: One who chants the Naam, the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, in his mind - the Lord is pleasing to his mind. In the mind of the devotees there is such a great yearning for the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਵਸਿਆ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸ ਗਟਾਕ ਪੀਆਉ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: man har har vasiaa guramat har rasiaa har har ras gattaak peeaau jeeo |
lines.english: The Name of the Lord, Har, Har, abides in their minds, and through the Guru's Teachings, they savor the Lord, Har, Har; they drink in the sublime essence of the Lord with abandon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ਨਿਤ ਆਪੁ ਲੁਕਾਇਆ ਮਤ ਜਮੁ ਪਕਰੈ ਲੈ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jag maran na bhaaeaa nit aap lukaaeaa mat jam pakarai lai jaae jeeo |
lines.english: The people of the world do not like death; they try to hide from it. They are afraid that the Messenger of Death may catch them and take them away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕੋ ਇਹੁ ਜੀਅੜਾ ਰਖਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har antar baahar har prabh eko ihu jeearraa rakhiaa na jaae jeeo |
lines.english: Inwardly and outwardly, the Lord God is the One and Only; this soul cannot be concealed from Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਜੀਉ ਰਖੀਜੈ ਹਰਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਲੋੜੀਜੈ ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਵਸਤੁ ਸੋ ਲੈ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: kiau jeeo rakheejai har vasat lorreejai jis kee vasat so lai jaae jeeo |
lines.english: How can one keep one's soul, when the Lord wishes to have it? All things belong to Him, and He shall take them away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਕਰਣ ਪਲਾਵ ਕਰਿ ਭਰਮੇ ਸਭਿ ਅਉਖਧ ਦਾਰੂ ਲਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh karan palaav kar bharame sabh aaukhadh daaroo laae jeeo |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs wander around in pathetic lamentation, trying all medicines and remedies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਭਾਇਆ ਨਿਤ ਆਪੁ ਲੁਕਾਇਆ ਮਤ ਜਮੁ ਪਕਰੈ ਲੈ ਜਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jag maran na bhaaeaa nit aap lukaaeaa mat jam pakarai lai jaae jeeo |2|
lines.english: The people of the world do not like death; they try to hide from it. They are afraid that the Messenger of Death may catch them and take them away. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਵਸਤੁ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਲਏ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਜਨ ਉਬਰੇ ਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis kee vasat prabh le suaamee jan ubare sabad kamaae jeeo |
lines.english: God, the Master, unto whom all things belong, shall take them away; the Lord's servant is redeemed by living the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਲਿਖਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋਹਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਉਬਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਨਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhur maran likhaaeaa guramukh sohaaeaa jan ubare har har dhiaan jeeo |
lines.english: Death is pre-ordained; the Gurmukhs look beauteous, and the humble beings are saved, meditating on the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸੋਭਾ ਪਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਧੇ ਜਾਨਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har sobhaa paaee har naam vaddiaaee har daragah paidhe jaan jeeo |
lines.english: Through the Lord they obtain honor, and through the Lord's Name, glorious greatness. In the Court of the Lord, they are robed in honor.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਦੋਵੈ ਦੁਖ ਮੇਟੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਮੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran dovai dukh mette har raamai naam samaaeaa |
lines.english: The pains of both birth and death are eliminated, and they merge into the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਰਗਹ ਪੈਧੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਸੀਧੇ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਤੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har daragah paidhe har naamai seedhe har naamai te sukh paaeaa |
lines.english: Robed in honor in the Court of the Lord, in the perfection of the Lord's Name, they obtain peace through the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਰਲਿ ਏਕੋ ਹੋਏ ਹਰਿ ਜਨ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਏਕ ਸਮਾਨਿ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har jan prabh ral eko hoe har jan prabh ek samaan jeeo |
lines.english: The Lord's servants meet with God and merge into Oneness. The Lord's servant and God are one and the same.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਲਿਖਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੋਹਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਉਬਰੇ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਨਿ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: dhur maran likhaaeaa guramukh sohaaeaa jan ubare har har dhiaan jeeo |3|
lines.english: Death is pre-ordained; the Gurmukhs look beauteous, and the humble beings are saved, meditating on the Lord, Har, Har. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਬਿਨਾਸੈ ਲਗਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jag upajai binasai binas binaasai lag guramukh asathir hoe jeeo |
lines.english: The people of the world are born, only to perish, and perish, and perish again. Only by attaching oneself to the Lord as Gurmukh, does one become permanent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਕਿ ਰਸਾਏ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਹਰਿ ਮੁਖਿ ਚੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur mantru drirraae har rasak rasaae har amrit har mukh choe jeeo |
lines.english: The Guru implants His Mantra within the heart, and one savors the sublime essence of the Lord; the Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord trickles into his mouth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਮਰ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam amar pad paaeaa har naam samaavai soee |
lines.english: Through the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, one obtains the immortal status, and merges into the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮੁਆ ਜੀਵਾਇਆ ਫਿਰਿ ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: har amrit ras paaeaa muaa jeevaaeaa fir baahurr maran na hoee |
lines.english: Obtaining the Ambrosial Essence of the Lord, the dead are restored to life, and do not die again.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਟੇਕ ਹੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak naam adhaar ttek hai bin naavai avar na koe jeeo |
lines.english: The Naam, the Name of the Lord, is the only Support and Anchor of servant Nanak; without the Naam, there is nothing else at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਗੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਬਿਨਾਸੈ ਲਗਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਅਸਥਿਰੁ ਹੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੬॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: jag upajai binasai binas binaasai lag guramukh asathir hoe jeeo |4|6|13|
lines.english: The people of the world are born, only to perish, and perish, and perish again. Only by attaching oneself to the Lord as Gurmukh, does one become permanent. ||4||6||13||
